payload.label: picture frame
payload.long_description: Close-up of a dark brown wooden picture frame with a narrow gold beaded inner trim and glossy finish; the bottom and left edges of the rectangular frame are visible and cut off by the image (edge-cropped), revealing a framed seascape painting with sailboats—appears wall-mounted and photographed from approximately 0.6 m away.

message.content: {"label":"picture frame","short_description":"dark wooden frame, edge-cropped","long_description":"Close-up of a dark brown wooden picture frame with a narrow gold beaded inner trim and glossy finish; the bottom and left edges of the rectangular frame are visible and cut off by the image (edge-cropped), revealing a framed seascape painting with sailboats—appears wall-mounted and photographed from approximately 0.6 m away.","attributes":["dark brown wood","gold inner trim","glossy finish","rectangular","bottom edge visible","left edge visible","edge-cropped (partial)","wall-mounted","seascape painting visible"],"distance_from_camera_m":0.6}
